goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:30' and should go to 'leicester'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cambridge contemporary art'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 21:30 and should go to leicester
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called cambridge contemporary art
